sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n506" key="a(gh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁγής</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n506.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">guilty, accursed,</tr_> dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n506.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> in good sense, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pure, holy,</tr_> of the sun, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἁγέα κύκλον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
